name: keyleak-detector
desc: Runtime leak detector for modern web apps — finds exposed API keys, validates BaaS misconfigurations (Supabase/Firebase RLS), and catches secrets in JS bundles…
descFull: Runtime leak detector for modern web apps — finds exposed API keys, validates BaaS misconfigurations (Supabase/Firebase RLS), and catches secrets in JS bundles. Chrome extension + CLI.
